---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect to help us fix it
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, one-line description of the bug.

## Reproduction steps

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include full error messages and stack traces.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 24.04)
- Python version: `python --version`
- Node version (if frontend): `node --version`
- Commit / tag: `git rev-parse --short HEAD`
- Deployment mode: docker compose / host / cloud

## Logs

Paste the relevant logs here. **Redact any secrets, tokens, or production
data** before pasting.

```
<logs>
```

## Additional context

Anything else that helps reproduce or diagnose the issue (config diff,
related issues, screenshots).
